CustomField.description: Let the Rep know what month they need to touch the donor next
CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "January"), "April", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "February"), "May", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "March"), "June", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "April"), "July", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "May"), "August", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "June"), "September", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "July"), "October", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "August"), "November", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "September"), "December", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "October"), "January", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "November"), "February", IF( ISPICKVAL( Monthly_Touch__c , "December"), "March",NULL))))))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the month that you need to touch/communicate with your donor next.
CustomField.label: Next Touch
